series_metadata.series_title: County Report of Retail License Fees Remitted for Tax Enforcement
series_metadata.series_description: Monthly report (CIG-100) and associated docmentation submitted by county auditors detailing portion of retail cigarette license fees being submitted to the State.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 3 years after the end of the calendar year for forms received during the calendar year or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year., Paper: Shred
